request: can you get me the agent workload

result.final_summary: Resolution branch encountered an error due to missing ticket_id (null), indicating the triage request was operational/management in nature rather than a specific end-user ticket. Escalation branch successfully processed the request as a system-wide operational analysis, generating a comprehensive dashboard revealing critical SLA breaches (44% system-wide, 100% on Critical/High priorities), capacity constraints across 7 available agents, and crisis-level issues in Security (100% breach) and Software (64% breach) categories. Escalation recommended immediate reassignment and priority escalation based on detailed workload analysis and root cause identification. The escalated intent takes precedence as this represents an operational management request requiring supervisory action rather than standard ticket resolution.

output.summary: Operational request for agent workload metrics routed to escalation team for administrative reporting and data retrieval.
